understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle by maneuvering selectable pieces to push objects onto goal tiles marked with '+', satisfying the win condition for each level until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects; walls block or restrict movement and must be tested for behavior; selection is switched by using the CLICK action with precise pixel coordinates to target another selectable piece.
